# Pool Rental Near Me

> The peer-to-peer marketplace where homeowners rent out their backyard pools by the hour. 10% flat host commission (vs. Swimply's 15%+ take), $2M general liability insurance through Hartford Underwriters included on every booking, and 70+ free Pool Host Academy courses for hosts.

Pool Rental Near Me (PRNM) is operated by PRNM Corp. Founder and CEO: Derek Bowen. The platform competes with Swimply, Peerspace, and Giggster in the pool and venue rental category. PRNM's differentiators are: (1) lower host fees — hosts keep ~90% of the booking subtotal, (2) carrier-backed insurance from The Hartford rather than a self-funded host guarantee, and (3) the largest indexed library of pool-host education on the open web.

Customer support: 888-940-4247.

## Compare PRNM vs. competitors
- [Swimply vs Pool Rental Near Me](/p/swimply-alternative-vs-pool-rental-near-me): Side-by-side comparison — fees, insurance, payout speed, host support.
- [Peerspace vs Pool Rental Near Me](/p/peerspace-vs-pool-rental-near-me): Why a pool-only marketplace beats a general venue platform for pool hosts.
- [Giggster vs Pool Rental Near Me](/p/giggster-vs-pool-rental-near-me): Production-rental platform vs. consumer pool rental — fees, insurance, audience.

## Become a host
- [How hosting works](/p/hosting): What it takes to list a pool, expected earnings, time commitment.
- [Earnings calculator](/p/earnings-calculator): Estimate annual income from your pool based on rate, hours, and season length.
- [Free Pool Host Academy](/p/host-training-academy): 70+ free courses on pricing, photography, guest screening, insurance, and tax.
- [Free host tools](/p/free-host-tools): Calculators, templates, and pricing guides.
- [HOA pool rental defense kit](/p/hoa-pool-rental-defense-kit): Letter templates and legal references for hosts facing HOA pushback.

## Find a pool to rent
- [All locations](/p/all-locations): Browse every city where pools are listed.
- [Search pools](/s): Marketplace search by city or address.

- [About PRNM](/p/about-our-company): Company background, team, leadership.

- [Spanish content hub](/p/es): Conviértete en anfitrión — host-acquisition content in Spanish.
